title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the Armed Forces Tribunal Act, 2007. (2) It shall come into force on such date1 as the Central Government may, by notification, appoint.
footnote: 1. 15th June, 2008, vide notification No. S.O. 14(E), dated 13th June, 2008, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii).
